title: Cluster Mempool
description: Cluster mempool organizes connected transactions into clusters and mining-order chunks so Bitcoin Core can make more predictable policy, package relay, replacement, and block-selection decisions under load.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts: cluster-mempool
resources.notes: Design goals and edge-case handling discussions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Baseline mempool and relay context for package policy discussions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 Release Notes: Cluster Mempool
resources.notes: Canonical explanation of clusters, chunks, fee ordering, and the related diagnostic RPCs.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 getmempoolcluster RPC
resources.notes: Optional developer reference for inspecting one connected cluster; this RPC is not a standalone learner node.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.x Mempool Terminology
resources.notes: Definitions for clusters, chunks, and package relationships; the RPCs remain optional implementation references.
